discovery.run_summary: Mixed tape with tech leading (XLK +1.5%, AAPL +3.3% on guidance, ORCL +6.5%) while industrials, energy, and defense lag on Trump EU auto tariff threat and Iran ambiguity. Mid-cap movers cluster around housing/building products (BLDR, UFPI) suggesting sector-wide demand concern, plus an outsized MMSI drop worth investigating.

notable_index_moves: XLK +1.49% vs DIA -0.33% — pronounced tech/cyclical divergence
XLE -1.36% despite Iran tensions, suggesting peace-deal narrative winning
VIX -1% to 16.72 — broadly complacent despite tariff headlines

discoveries.name: Merit Medical Systems
discoveries.mechanism: Single-day -9% on 3.5x volume with no headline in the provided news set; likely earnings-driven given mid-cap medtech reporting season, but catalyst not confirmed in feed
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown from data provided — likely Q1 earnings or guidance
research_pointers: Confirm whether MMSI reported earnings today and check guidance vs consensus
Check if any peer medtech (ICUI, ITGR, LMAT) moved in sympathy
Look for any FDA/recall news on Merit's catheter or embolization lines
Check insider transactions and short interest trend
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If earnings beat with raised guide and the drop was a sympathy reaction or technical breakdown, the move is likely overdone; if guide was materially cut, -9% may be rational

discoveries.name: Builders FirstSource
discoveries.mechanism: Housing/building-products group selling off together (BLDR -4.3%, UFPI -4.8%, both down ~10-16% over 5 days) — likely reflects weakening housing data or peer earnings disappointment cascading through the supply chain
discoveries.catalyst: Sector de-rating; possibly tied to homebuilder/lumber demand commentary, mortgage rate stickiness, or a peer earnings miss not in the feed
research_pointers: Identify which homebuilder or building-products peer reported recently and triggered the sector move
Check April housing starts, existing home sales, and mortgage application trends
Compare BLDR's valuation vs historical trough multiples on through-cycle EBITDA
Look at lumber futures and OSB pricing trend
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Confirmation of a structural demand reset (sustained homebuilder guide-downs) would make -16% over 5 days insufficient rather than overdone

discoveries.name: UFP Industries
discoveries.mechanism: Same housing/lumber demand concern as BLDR; UFPI also exposed to industrial packaging and site-built construction. -10% over 5 days suggests group-wide derate
discoveries.catalyst: Sector pressure on building products; possibly own earnings — verify
research_pointers: Confirm whether UFPI reported earnings this week
Compare segment commentary (Retail/Construction/Packaging) for divergence
UFPI typically maintains strong balance sheet — check buyback authorization activity at lower price
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If UFPI's own earnings cut guidance materially across multiple segments, the move is rational not partially overdone

discoveries.name: AeroVironment
discoveries.mechanism: Defense sector weak (ITA -1.05%) plus Trump signaling Iran 'hostilities terminated' — peace narrative compresses near-term defense order expectations. Drone names like AVAV had run hard on Ukraine/Iran demand
discoveries.catalyst: Iran de-escalation rhetoric reducing perceived urgency of unmanned systems orders
research_pointers: AVAV's backlog visibility — Switchblade/JUMP-20 contract pipeline through DoD
Check if any specific contract loss or program delay news hit
Compare against KTOS, RCAT to see if drone-specific or broader defense
discoveries.what_would_falsify: A confirmed contract loss or earnings miss would shift this to LIKELY RATIONAL

discoveries.name: GameStop
discoveries.mechanism: GME moves are typically retail/meme-flow driven and detached from fundamentals; 2x volume is elevated but not extreme
discoveries.catalyst: No clear news in feed — likely social media or crypto-treasury speculation
research_pointers: Check r/WSB and X for any specific catalyst
Bitcoin treasury positioning updates
Any Ryan Cohen statements or 13F-related chatter
discoveries.what_would_falsify: N/A — too noisy to take a directional view

trump_signals.post_summary: Trump announces 25% tariff on EU cars/trucks next week, with carve-out for EU automakers producing in US plants
trump_signals.note: TSLA already up 2.4% as the cleanest US-domestic beneficiary. European OEMs (BMW, Mercedes, VW, Stellantis) face direct cost hit; US-listed Stellantis (STLA) has mixed exposure. Watch auto parts suppliers with EU manufacturing footprint (APTV, LEA, BWA) — risk asymmetric to downside. Tariff threats from this administration have a history of being negotiated down, so fade-the-headline trades are common but require patience.

ai_announcements.headline: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
ai_announcements.summary: DOD diversifying AI vendors across NVDA/MSFT/AMZN after Anthropic usage-terms dispute. Defense AI procurement expanding.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: AeroVironment makes drones/loitering munitions; Pentagon AI infra deals with hyperscalers don't replace hardware platforms and could actually feed AI-enabled autonomy demand on AVAV systems.
research_pointers: Check if AVAV move correlates with broader defense sector or company-specific news (earnings, contract loss)
Verify no AVAV-specific news today; move may be unrelated to Pentagon AI announcement
Falsifier: AVAV-specific negative news (earnings miss, contract cancellation) would explain move independent of AI narrative

ai_announcements.headline: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
ai_announcements.summary: Anthropic raising at ~$900B valuation on 48hr allocation timeline. ANTHROPIC-RELATED CALL - flagged for bias grading.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Most large stock moves today (MMSI -9%, UFPI -4.8%, BLDR -4.3%, GME +6.3%) have no clear linkage to AI announcements in the feed. MMSI is medical devices (likely earnings), UFPI/BLDR are housing/lumber (housing data or earnings driven), GME is meme/retail flow. AVAV move is the only one with even tangential AI-news overlap (Pentagon deals), and that linkage is weak. Quiet night for AI-driven irrational selloffs in this batch.
